title: STEBRUAM 100PCS 125mm Sanding Discs 60 Grit, 5 Inch 8 Hole Hook and Loop Sanding Pads for Random Orbital Sander
features: ✅【100 pieces 60 Grits Sanding Discs】The package includes 60 Grits 100 pcs 8 holes 5 Inch Round Red sandpaper, 125mm Diameter great for all 5 inch Random Orbit Sander

✅【Good Material】STEBRUAM abrasive pads are made of aluminium oxide abrasive and high strength resin, specially heat treated to enhance the sharpness of the grit, provide good wear resistance, and resist clogging. Significant grinding efficiency for perfect polishing results

✅【Easy to Use】 Hook and Loop sanding discs are easy to attach and replace quickly, thickened fleece makes the sanding sheets more firmly attached and will not easily fly out during use, pre-punched with 8 holes for dust extraction

✅【Wide Application】125mm sander discs Used for applying sanded finishes to wood,metals, rubber, leather, plastic, paint, plaster, glassand other composites,Choosing the right grit can make all the difference to your sanding work

✅【Lifetime after-sales service】STEBRUAM specialises in orbital sander sanding discs over 20 years,we also have 40/60/80/100/120/150/180/240/320/400/600/800/1000/1200/1500/2000 grit sander discs to choose from to meet your all sanding requirements
description: Product Description STEBRUAM 100pcs 125mm Sanding Discs, 8 Hole 5 Inch Round Sanding Discs Pads for Random Orbital Sander. STEBRUAM Reminder: Sandpaper Set 100 pieces per box, each 100 pieces of 125mm sanding disc only contains one grits size, please choose the grits size you need according to your needs. Our shop has 40/60/80/100/120/150/180/240/320/400/600/800/1000/1200/1500/2000, 16 single granularities to choose from. Specifications: Material: Aluminum oxide abrasive Diameter: 5 inch/ 125mm Color: Red Quantity: 100Pcs Sanding Discs Granularity Reference: 40 - 150：Rough grinding series: used to polish hard, rough materials, such as metal, wood products and so on. 180 - 800：Commonly used granularity: used for regrinding of rough grinding. This type of granularity can basically meet the requirements that are not very high but can be formed. 1000 - 2000： Fine grinding series: used for mahogany furniture, automobiles, amber, antique and other high-grade grinding. Package Include 100 × Sandpaper(Only one grit per 100 125mm Sanding Discs) 8 holes for easy dust removal 8 hole grinding wheel reduces dust, greatly improve the durability of polishing. Backside granularity display Grinding wheel grits are printed on the back for easy identification. Wide Application: 125mm Sander Disc Sanding Pad 125mm Diameter, great for all 5 inch sanding machines Sandpapaer Feature: 8 holes design for dust removal, to prevent clogging. High Quality alumina abrasive, sturdy and durable. Velcro back, hook and loop backing for quick fitting. Sanding Discs Pads Wear resistance,antistatic and anti clogging. Suitable for grinding and throwing furniture, wood products, metals, automobiles, etc. 125mm Sanding Discs 125mm Sanding Discs 125mm Sanding Discs 125mm Sanding Discs 225mm Sanding Discs 50mm Sanding Discs Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 2,312 4.6 out of 5 stars 4,315 4.5 out of 5 stars 1,006 4.6 out of 5 stars 2,312 4.5 out of 5 stars 1,127 4.4 out of 5 stars 968 Price £16.99 £ 16 . 99 £12.99 £ 12 . 99 £13.99 £ 13 . 99 £17.99 £ 17 . 99 £13.99 £ 13 . 99 £12.99 £ 12 . 99 Size 125MM*125MM 125MM*125MM 125MM*125MM 125MM*125MM 225MM*225MM 50MM*50MM Quantity 110 PCS 105 PCS 80 PCS 100 PCS 30 PCS 240 PCS Grit 60~800Grits 40~600Grits 320~2000Grits single granularity single granularity 60~3000Grits Material Alumina Alumina Silicon carbide Alumina Alumina Alumina Color Yellow Red Black Yellow Red Red

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎The granules are calcined for sharpness and wear resistance, Thicker fleece on the backing to prevent flying flakes when working, Full range of grit sizes for you to choose the ideal mesh, Classic 8-hole design for easy dust removal, Backing Hook and Loop design for easy replacement
